events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young for the legendary Queen guitarist Brian May this week! Still rocking stages and inspiring generations with that iconic Red Special.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years of unparalleled rock 'n' roll swagger! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger, still proving that age is just a number when you've got moves like his.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, MTV declared 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first-ever track. The irony is still golden.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis's debut album, "Definitely Maybe", was originally released on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Still sounds as fresh and anthemic as ever.

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to shake, rattle, and roll.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On September 13, 1996, the influential rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty years ago this month, hip-hop lost a titan. Remembering the profound impact and enduring voice of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970; the legendary guitarist would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the guitar world lost its greatest innovator. Jimi Hendrix's sound still resonates like no other.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album "Abbey Road" was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover and those tracks are just as timeless today.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy-five years young for the one and only Chrissie Hynde! Still delivering those distinctive vocals and rock 'n' roll attitude.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and rock 'n' roll icon, Liam Gallagher, turns 54.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the man, the myth, the legend, Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock 'n' roll spirit.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem "Imagine" was released as a single on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listened to music with "1,000 songs in your pocket."

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago this month, Apple introduced the iPod. Remember those days of '1,000 songs in your pocket'?

events.title: James Bond Day 64th Anniversary
events.blurb: James Bond Day marks the anniversary of the release of the very first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, would have been 86 today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-seven years young for the comedy genius John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British institution.
